issues.description: Condition missing required check: 'LeaderHasType' with type 'CP' is mandatory but DSL has 'Always'
SearchDeck action incomplete: missing 'count' (3), missing filter logic for 'type includes CP AND name not Spandam', missing trash destination for remaining cards
Action flow broken: should reveal up to 1 card to hand, then trash remaining cards—requires two sequential actions (SearchDeck then ForceDiscard/trash)

actions.description: Trash remaining cards from the 3 looked at
